summary: The diff introduces data-model changes for proposal attempts (proposalId becomes optional) plus a state migration, and updates frontend components/hooks; however, there is no evidence of an implemented backend cross-canister call to NNS Governance or frontend wiring to a real submission method. The frontend currently still communicates that real submission is not implemented and the submit hook throws an error.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a backend method that submits a real NNS motion proposal to the NNS Governance canister via a cross-canister call, accepting neuron ID + proposal text, returning the real proposal ID on success or a descriptive error on failure, and restricted to authenticated users (#user).
missing_requirements.reason: In the provided backend diff summary (backend/main.mo truncated), there is no shown shared method that performs an NNS Governance cross-canister call and returns a real proposal ID. The frontend hook explicitly indicates the backend method does not exist yet.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update backend proposal history recording to add a pending attempt at submission start, then record a subsequent success (with real proposal ID) or failure (with error message), keeping the last 10 attempts per user.
missing_requirements.reason: While types/migration indicate proposalId is now optional and there are internal helpers for attempts, the diff is truncated before showing the proposal-attempt recording implementation and there is no evidence of the required two-step (pending then success/failure) history update tied to a real NNS submission.
evidence: backend/migration.mo (proposalId changed to optional in stored history)

missing_requirements.requirement: Wire the Proposal UI to call the new backend real-submission method, remove simulated submission messaging, show success with real proposal ID, show backend error on failure, and ensure Activity History displays real proposal IDs and statuses.
missing_requirements.reason: The submit hook does not call the backend; it throws an error stating real submission is not implemented. ProposalForm also displays a prominent warning that backend integration is required, which conflicts with the requirement to remove simulated/non-real submission messaging and to perform real submission. Activity history changes alone do not satisfy the wiring requirement.
evidence: frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts (useSubmitMotionProposal always throws error; no actor.submitMotionProposal call)
frontend/src/components/proposals/ProposalForm.tsx (warning: 'Real NNS proposal submission is not yet implemented')
frontend/src/components/history/ActivityHistory.tsx (updated display logic, but does not demonstrate real submission wiring)

hallucinated_features.description: Frontend mutation hook for submitting proposals intentionally throws an error saying real NNS submission is not implemented, instead of calling a backend real-submission method.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-13 requires wiring the UI to the new backend method for real submission; throwing an implementation-placeholder error is the opposite behavior and is not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Proposal form displays a prominent 'Backend Integration Required: Real NNS proposal submission is not yet implemented' warning banner.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-13 requires removing simulated/non-real submission messaging and showing real proposal ID on success or backend error on failure; adding an explicit 'not implemented' banner is not requested and conflicts with the goal.

hallucinated_features.description: NeuronManager UI text says the app does not directly manage hotkeys and instructs users to use the NNS dapp for hotkey changes.
hallucinated_features.reason: This build request is specifically about enabling real NNS motion proposal submission; changing hotkey-management messaging/behavior is not requested in REQ-11..REQ-13.
